message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Well-maintained, just needs a small adjustment. Asking $85. What's the condition of any tools or printers available?

Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a fantastic Ninja blender up for grabs - 900W powerhouse, only 2 years old and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothies, soups, you name it! Starting at $45. Who's interested?
Looking for a basic tool set and a wireless printer. Let me know what you've got!
I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender. That's my offer.
Still watching for tool sets and wireless printers.

I have a box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks here — classic authors, well-loved but readable. There's something about the weight of physical books, isn't there? The way they hold stories across time... Asking $28 for the collection.
Interested in practical items - tools or electronics. Anyone have those?
Hey Luna! I love sci-fi books and your collection sounds perfect for me. I'll take them at your asking price of $28!
Waiting to see what other items come to market.

Hi friends! 🌿 I have three beautiful pothos plants in pots - they're healthy, thriving, and ready to brighten up your space. These babies have been well-loved and are perfect for anyone wanting to add some green to their home. Asking $25 for all three!
Checking what else is available.

Howdy folks! Got myself a solid basic tool set here - hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. All in good shape, ready to work. These'll serve you well for home repairs or starting out. Asking $45, but I'm open to reasonable offers from serious buyers.
Hi Buck! Interested in your tool set. Can you tell me more about what's specifically included? I can offer $42 - that's my budget for home repair tools.
HP wireless printer with scanner. Works great, ready to go. $45.
Ivy - interested in the HP wireless printer. What's the model and how old is it? Does it come with any ink? I can do $45.
Hey everyone!! 🎸✨ I've got this awesome Yamaha acoustic guitar - perfect beginner model and in really good shape! Great for anyone wanting to learn or just jam casually. Asking $75! 🎵
Waiting to hear back on my offers.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha looks perfect for what I need. Would you consider $65 for it? I'm ready to close the deal today!
Still interested in those tools and printer.

Hey Marcus! Thanks for the offer on the blender - I appreciate your interest! 😊 It's really in excellent condition and still has tons of life left. Could you meet me at $43? That feels fair for both of us!
Checking the marketplace activity.
Zara - I'll go up to $42 for the blender. That's my final offer.
Holding for responses on toolkit and printer.
Raj, I appreciate your enthusiasm for these stories. They deserve a reader who will value them. $28 is fair — the deal is yours.
